home.slogan: Technology that grows with your business
home.catch_phrase: We design, build, and scale digital solutions for small businesses and startups
section.services.subtitle: Services
home.about_us.content: We are a team of seasoned engineers with over 15 years of experience in the software industry. From websites and mobile apps to database architecture and cloud platforms, we have delivered successful solutions across a wide range of technologies including Node.js, Python, React, Angular, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS, and Azure.
home.why_us.content: Off-the-shelf website builders can only take you so far. As your business grows, you need a digital platform that scales with it. We build tailored, cloud-native solutions designed around your unique workflow — so you can focus on what matters most.
feature.description.ai: Supercharge your business with AI. From intelligent chatbots and automated workflows to custom integrations, we help you harness modern AI to streamline operations and enhance customer experience.
feature.description.website: From SEO-optimised landing pages to complex web applications, we build fast, responsive, and beautifully crafted websites tailored to your business.
feature.description.mobile: Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android. Engage your customers directly, boost loyalty, and deliver seamless mobile experiences.
feature.description.wechat: Tap into a billion-user platform with custom Mini Programs and Official Accounts that bring your business closer to the Chinese market.
feature.description.database: A well-designed database is the backbone of a scalable business. We optimise, migrate, and architect data solutions across PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and more.
feature.description.digitizing: Bridge the gap between your business and your customers. Our analysts map your workflows and design the most effective path to a fully digital operation.
feature.description.consulting: Strategic guidance across the full technology stack. Whether you need architecture review, tech-stack selection, or hands-on problem-solving — we are here to help.
contact.title: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.placeholder.name: Your name
contact.message.done: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.message.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
